description.zh-CN: 将音频或视频中的人声转写为可编辑字幕，支持自动识别语言、按停顿断句和低置信度标记。
description.en-US: Transcribes speech from audio or video into editable subtitles, with language detection, pause-based cue splitting, and low-confidence marking.

title.zh-CN: 授权下载高精度分段模型

description.zh-CN: 高精度模式使用的 pyannote 模型需要先在 Hugging Face 同意条款，并提供可访问该模型的 token。
description.en-US: The pyannote model used by High Accuracy mode requires accepting the Hugging Face terms and providing a token with access to the model.

description.zh-CN: 标准模式适合大多数文件；高精度模式分段更细，需要 Hugging Face 授权后下载模型。
description.en-US: Standard works for most files. High Accuracy creates finer speech segments and requires a Hugging Face-authorized model download.

description.zh-CN: 需要更高精度时，先在插件设置中下载更大的模型。
description.en-US: For higher accuracy, download a larger model in plugin settings first.

description.zh-CN: 不确定时保持自动检测；已知语言时手动选择可提升稳定性。
description.en-US: Keep Auto detect when unsure. Choosing a known language can improve stability.

description.zh-CN: 留空表示全部保留；只在自动检测语言时生效。
description.en-US: Leave empty to keep all languages. Only applies when language detection is automatic.

description.zh-CN: 间隔越长，字幕越容易合并；间隔越短，字幕切分越细。
description.en-US: Longer gaps merge more subtitle cues; shorter gaps split them more finely.

description.zh-CN: 开启后，低置信度结果会加删除标记，便于后续人工检查。
description.en-US: When enabled, low-confidence results are marked with deletion mark for manual review.
